inputs.name: num
inputs.description: Number whose absolute value is to be returned.

outputs.name: positiveNumber
outputs.description: Absolute value of the input number.

inputs.name: numList
inputs.description: Numbers (floating point numbers represented in a string list) to add.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Sum of the numbers in numList . If a sum cannot be produced, value contains one of the following:

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number to add.

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number to add.

inputs.name: precision
inputs.description: Optional. Number of decimal places to which the sum will be rounded. The default value is null. The precision parameter, if specified, will override the behavior set by the watt.server.math.floatOperation.mode property. For information about the watt.server.math.floatOperation.mode property, see the IBM webMethods Integration Server Administrator’s Guide .

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Sum of the numbers in num1 and num2 . If a sum cannot be produced, value contains one of the following:

inputs.name: numList
inputs.description: Numbers (integers represented as Strings) to add.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Sum of the numbers in numList .

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number (integer represented as a String) to add.

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number (integer represented as a String) to add.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Sum of num1 and num2 .

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number to add. See the Usage Notes for supported sub-classes.

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number to add. See the Usage Notes for supported sub-classes.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Sum of the numeric values of num1 and num2 .

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number (floating point number represented as a String) that is the dividend.

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number (floating point number represented as a String) that is the divisor.

inputs.name: precision
inputs.description: Optional. Number of decimal places to which the quotient will be rounded. The default value is null. The precision parameter, if specified, will override the behavior set by the watt.server.math.floatOperation.mode property. For information about the watt.server.math.floatOperation.mode property, see the IBM webMethods Integration Server Administrator’s Guide .

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: The quotient of num1 / num2 . If a quotient cannot be produced, value contains one of the following:

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number (integer represented as a String) that is the dividend.

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number (integer represented as a String) that is the divisor.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: The quotient of num1 / num2 .

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number that is the dividend. See the Usage Notes for supported sub-classes.

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number that is the divisor. See the Usage Notes for supported sub-classes.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Quotient of num1 / num2 .

inputs.name: numList
inputs.description: List of numbers from which the largest number is to be returned.

outputs.name: maxValue
outputs.description: Largest number from the list of numbers.

inputs.name: numList
inputs.description: List of numbers from which the smallest number is to be returned.

outputs.name: minValue
outputs.description: Smallest number from the list of numbers.

inputs.name: numList
inputs.description: Numbers (floating point numbers represented as Strings) to multiply.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Product of the numbers in numlist . If a product cannot be produced, value contains one of the following:

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number (floating point number represented as a String) to multiply.

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number (floating point number represented as a String) to multiply.

inputs.name: precision
inputs.description: Optional. Number of decimal places to which the product will be rounded. The default value is null. The precision parameter, if specified, will override the behavior set by the watt.server.math.floatOperation.mode property. For information about the watt.server.math.floatOperation.mode property, see the IBM webMethods Integration Server Administrator’s Guide .

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Product of the numeric values of num1 and num2 . If a product cannot be produced, value contains one of the following:

inputs.name: numList
inputs.description: Numbers (floating point numbers represented as Strings) to multiply.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Product of the numbers in numList .

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number (integer represented as a String) to multiply.

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number (integer represented as a String) to multiply.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Product of num1 and num2 .

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number to multiply. See the Usage Notes for supported sub-classes.

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number to multiply. See the Usage Notes for supported sub-classes.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Product of num1 and num2 .

inputs.name: number
inputs.description: Generated random number.

outputs.name: number
outputs.description: Generated random number.

inputs.name: num
inputs.description: Number to be rounded.

inputs.name: numberOfDigits
inputs.description: Specifies the number of digits to which you want to round the number.

inputs.name: roundingMode
inputs.description: Optional. Specifies the rounding method. Valid values for the roundingMode parameter are RoundHalfUp , RoundUp , RoundDown , RoundCeiling , RoundFloor , RoundHalfDown , and RoundHalfEven . The default value is RoundHalfUp .

outputs.name: roundedNumber
outputs.description: The rounded number.

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number (floating point number represented as a String).

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number (floating point number represented as a String) to subtract from num1 .

inputs.name: precision
inputs.description: Optional. Number of decimal places to which the difference will be rounded. The default value is null. The precision parameter, if specified, will override the behavior set by the watt.server.math.floatOperation.mode property. For information about the watt.server.math.floatOperation.mode property, see the IBM webMethods Integration Server Administrator’s Guide .

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Difference of num1 - num2 . If a difference cannot be produced, value contains one of the following:

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number (integer represented as a String).

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number (integer represented as a String) to subtract from num1 .

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Difference of num1 - num2 .

inputs.name: num1
inputs.description: Number. See the Usage Notes for supported sub-classes.

inputs.name: num2
inputs.description: Number to subtract from num1 . See Usage Notes for supported sub-classes.

outputs.name: value
outputs.description: Difference of num1 - num2 .

inputs.name: num
inputs.description: Number (represented as a string) to be converted to numeric format.

inputs.name: convertAs
inputs.description: Optional. Specifies the Java numeric data type to which the num parameter is to be converted. Valid values for the convertAs parameter are java.lang.Double , java.lang.Float , java.lang.Integer , java.math.BigDecimal , java.math.BigInteger , java.lang.Long . The default value is java.lang.Double .

outputs.name: num
outputs.description: Converted numeric object.
